job_id.description: The unique identifier of the embed job.

status.description: The current status of the embed job.

model.description: The embedding model used for the job.

name.description: The name of the embed job.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the embed job was created.

input_dataset_id.description: The ID of the input dataset.

output_dataset_id.description: The ID of the output dataset containing embeddings.

truncate.description: The truncation strategy used for the job.
